name: Oreta Building
description: The main administrative building of Laguna University, housing major department offices including the Office of the President and key administrative units.

rooms.name: Cashier Office
rooms.description: Payment center for tuition and miscellaneous fees.

rooms.name: HRMO Office
rooms.description: Human Resource Management Office for faculty and staff.

rooms.name: Security Office
rooms.description: Campus security administration and monitoring.

rooms.name: Office of the President
rooms.description: Executive office of the University President.

rooms.name: VP Academic Affairs
rooms.description: Office overseeing all academic programs and policies.

rooms.name: Board Room
rooms.description: Main conference room for executive meetings.

name: LU 01 - LU 06
description: Main classroom block for General Education and basic college courses. Houses six interconnected rooms designed for large lecture classes.

floors.name: Ground Floor
floors.colleges: College of Arts and Sciences — General Education

rooms.name: LU 01
rooms.description: Large lecture room, capacity 60 students.

rooms.name: LU 02
rooms.description: General purpose classroom, capacity 50 students.

rooms.name: LU 03
rooms.description: General purpose classroom, capacity 50 students.

floors.name: Second Floor
floors.colleges: College of Arts and Sciences — General Education

rooms.name: LU 04
rooms.description: General purpose classroom, capacity 50 students.

rooms.name: LU 05
rooms.description: General purpose classroom, capacity 50 students.

rooms.name: LU 06
rooms.description: Seminar room with projector setup, capacity 35 students.

name: CHS Laboratory / LU 07
description: College of Health Sciences Laboratory for Nursing and Allied Health students. Equipped with medical simulation equipment and health science tools.

rooms.name: Nursing Skills Lab
rooms.description: Simulation lab for basic and advanced nursing procedures.

rooms.name: Anatomy & Physiology Lab
rooms.description: Laboratory for A&P subjects with anatomical models.

rooms.name: CHS Faculty Room
rooms.description: Faculty area for CHS instructors.

name: SHS Faculty / LU 09
description: The central office for Senior High School faculty and coordinators. Houses SHS department heads and academic advisors.

rooms.name: SHS Principal's Office
rooms.description: Office of the Senior High School Principal.

rooms.name: SHS Coordinator's Office
rooms.description: Academic and student affairs coordination for SHS.

rooms.name: SHS Faculty Lounge
rooms.description: Rest and work area for SHS faculty members.

name: LU 10
description: General purpose classroom building for various college departments. Frequently used for examinations and special lectures.

rooms.name: LU 10 - Room A
rooms.description: Lecture room, capacity 55 students.

rooms.name: LU 10 - Room B
rooms.description: Lecture room, capacity 55 students.

name: Records Office / LU 11
description: The office responsible for the maintenance of student permanent records, transcripts of records, and official documents.

floors.name: Ground Floor
floors.colleges: Office of the Registrar — Records Division

rooms.name: Records Main Office
rooms.description: Student records retrieval, certification, and authentication.

rooms.name: Document Archives
rooms.description: Storage of historical student and institutional records.

name: Registrar / LU 13-14
description: The office for enrollment, grades submission, transcripts, and other academic documentation. Primary contact for all student academic records.

rooms.name: Enrollment Counter
rooms.description: Walk-in counter for enrollment and subject enrollment concerns.

rooms.name: Grades Window
rooms.description: Submission and inquiry counter for student grades.

rooms.name: TOR / Documents Window
rooms.description: Request and release of Transcript of Records and other official documents.

rooms.name: Registrar's Office
rooms.description: Office of the University Registrar.

name: University Clinic / LU 16
description: Provides medical and first-aid services to students, faculty, and staff. Houses a licensed nurse and visiting physician.

rooms.name: Consultation Room
rooms.description: Medical consultation area for students and staff.

rooms.name: Rest Area / Beds
rooms.description: Resting area with beds for sick students.

rooms.name: Medicine Dispensary
rooms.description: Basic medicines and first-aid supplies.

name: Research Center / LU 17
description: The hub for academic research, publication services, and institutional studies. Supports faculty and student research initiatives.

rooms.name: Research Office
rooms.description: Main office for research coordination and consultation.

rooms.name: Research Library
rooms.description: Collection of journals, theses, and dissertations.

name: HRMO / LU 18
description: Human Resource Management Office handling faculty and staff employment records, benefits, leaves, and payroll coordination.

rooms.name: HRMO Main Office
rooms.description: Walk-in counter for HR concerns.

rooms.name: Payroll Section
rooms.description: Processing of faculty and staff compensation.

name: Cashier / LU 19
description: The central office for tuition payments, miscellaneous fees, and other financial transactions. Accepts cash and online payment validation.

rooms.name: Payment Window 1 (A–L)
rooms.description: Payment counter for students with surnames A to L.

rooms.name: Payment Window 2 (M–Z)
rooms.description: Payment counter for students with surnames M to Z.

rooms.name: Online Payment Validation
rooms.description: Counter for validating GCash, bank transfer, and online payments.

name: Admin Office / LU 20
description: Executive office of the university administration. Handles institutional directives, communications, and university-wide policies.

rooms.name: Administration Office
rooms.description: Main reception and admin coordination office.

rooms.name: Executive Conference Room
rooms.description: Private meeting room for administrative officers.

rooms.name: OSAS Office
rooms.description: Office of Student Affairs and Services.

name: Annex Building
description: Additional administrative and academic support offices. Houses overflow offices and support departments.

rooms.name: Guidance Office
rooms.description: Counseling and student guidance services.

rooms.name: Scholarship Office
rooms.description: Scholarships, grants, and financial aid processing.

rooms.name: Supreme Student Council Office
rooms.description: Student government office.

rooms.name: IT Support Room
rooms.description: Technical support for student and faculty digital concerns.

rooms.name: Reading Room
rooms.description: Quiet study area and supplemental library.

name: San Luis Gym
description: Major sports and events venue for university-wide gatherings, commencement exercises, and sports competitions.

rooms.name: Main Basketball Court
rooms.description: Full-size court for competitions and PE classes.

rooms.name: Locker Rooms
rooms.description: Male and female locker rooms for athletes.

rooms.name: Athletics Office
rooms.description: Office for sports coordination and scheduling.

name: Multi-Purpose Gym
description: Facility for basketball, volleyball, and physical education classes. Also used for indoor events and university assemblies.

rooms.name: Court A
rooms.description: Basketball / badminton court.

rooms.name: Court B
rooms.description: Volleyball court.

name: Pool Area
description: Laguna Sports Complex swimming facility used for Physical Education swim classes and varsity swimming competitions.

rooms.name: Swimming Pool (25m)
rooms.description: 25-meter competition pool with 6 lanes.

rooms.name: Shower / Changing Rooms
rooms.description: Male and female changing facilities.

name: New Building
description: The newest academic building with modern classroom facilities, smart board technology, and air-conditioned rooms.

floors.name: Ground Floor
floors.colleges: College of Engineering & Technology / College of Business

rooms.name: Room 101
rooms.description: Smart classroom with 65-inch display, capacity 45.

rooms.name: Room 102
rooms.description: Smart classroom, capacity 45.

rooms.name: Room 103
rooms.description: Smart classroom, capacity 45.

rooms.name: Room 201
rooms.description: Engineering classroom, capacity 45.

rooms.name: Room 202
rooms.description: Engineering classroom, capacity 45.

rooms.description: Faculty lounge and workroom for CET instructors.

rooms.name: Room 301
rooms.description: Business classroom, capacity 45.

rooms.name: Room 302
rooms.description: Business classroom, capacity 45.

rooms.name: CBA Faculty Room
rooms.description: Faculty lounge and workroom for CBA instructors.

name: Canteen
description: Main food court and student cafeteria area. Offers a variety of affordable meals, snacks, and beverages for students and staff.

rooms.name: Main Canteen Hall
rooms.description: Main dining area with multiple food stalls.

rooms.name: University Cooperative Store
rooms.description: Sells school supplies, uniforms, and snacks.

name: M.E Offices
description: Offices for Mechanical Engineering faculty, coordinators, and department administration.

floors.name: Ground Floor
floors.colleges: College of Engineering — Mechanical Engineering Department

rooms.name: ME Department Office
rooms.description: Main department office for ME students and faculty.

rooms.name: ME Faculty Room
rooms.description: Faculty workroom for ME instructors.

rooms.name: Thesis / Capstone Room
rooms.description: Room for ME thesis consultations and defense.

name: Science Labs (Chem/Bio/Phys)
description: State-of-the-art laboratories for Chemistry, Biology, and Physics experiments. Serves engineering, health sciences, and science program students.

floors.name: Ground Floor
floors.colleges: College of Engineering & College of Health Sciences

rooms.name: Chemistry Laboratory
rooms.description: Fully equipped chemistry lab with fume hoods and safety stations.

rooms.name: Biology Laboratory
rooms.description: Biology lab with microscopes and specimen collections.

rooms.name: Physics Laboratory
rooms.description: Physics lab with experiment equipment and measurement tools.

rooms.name: Lab Preparation Room
rooms.description: Storage and preparation room for lab materials.

name: Gate 1
description: The primary entrance for students and vehicles entering the campus. Security checkpoint with guard on duty 24/7.

name: Gate 2
description: The secondary entrance and exit point located near the sports complex. Used primarily by athletes and during large events.

name: Athlete's Village
description: Housing facility for Laguna University's student athletes. Provides dormitory-style accommodation for varsity players.

rooms.name: Main Lobby
rooms.description: Reception and common area for residents.

rooms.name: Dorm Manager's Office
rooms.description: Administration office for dormitory management.

rooms.name: Male Dormitory Wing
rooms.description: Dormitory rooms for male student athletes.

rooms.name: Female Dormitory Wing
rooms.description: Dormitory rooms for female student athletes.

name: Jose Rizal Monument
description: A landmark monument dedicated to the national hero Dr. Jose Rizal, located at the center of the campus. A common meeting point and photo spot for students.
